root_cause: Tailscale process OOM-killed repeatedly on 512MB Fly machine. nginx proxies /api/* to VPS via socat over Tailscale. With Tailscale dead, all API proxy requests time out (504). Static HTML likely still serves but panels that call /api/* fail.
evidence: Out of memory: Killed process 28812 (tailscale) total-vm:1261556kB
Out of memory: Killed process 28782 (tailscale) — multiple kills per minute
upstream timed out (110: Operation timed out) while reading response header from upstream

fix_options.description: Remove Tailscale from Fly machine; use Fly wireguard or direct VPS API proxy
Deploy cockpit static files only; API calls go direct to VPS (requires CORS/auth changes)

recommendation: Option A is the safest — upgrade Fly machine to 1GB. Tailscale needs ~500MB which leaves 512MB too tight with nginx also running.
